_comment: Starter architecture-fitness ruleset for the web/gui quick-start family (grm-quick-start-template, #314). Encodes the familiar fleet convention 'core is web-framework-free': domain logic lives in core/, the web crate/module wraps it, and a thin bin/ entrypoint wires both. Adapt the layer globs to the project's real module layout. To decline enforcement entirely, replace this file's contents with { "schema-version": 1, "opt_out": true, "opt_out-reason": "..." } — grm-architecture-audit surfaces that decision explicitly instead of silently passing. Design: docs/grimoire/design/architecture-fitness-design.md §Scaffold defaults.
